text.title: API Documentation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-documentation artefact.

step.name: outline
step.action: Create the 6 section stubs with anchors.

step.name: quick-start-curl
step.action: Write runnable curl with a test token; verify locally.

step.name: endpoints-from-spec
step.action: Render each operation with request/response examples pulled from spec.examples; cross-link to schemas.

step.name: error-table
step.action: Build table: type URI / title / status / when it fires / how to fix.

step.name: changelog-and-ship
step.action: One entry per spec_version with breaking-change flag + migration link.
